title: Clear 1.58L Glass Jug and Tumbler Set, Crystal Effect Water Juice Glasses Tumblers & Pitcher Jug, Ideal for Cold Water, Wine, Coffee, Milk and Juice Beverage, Set of 7
features: Complete 7-Piece Glass Drinkware Set: Elevate your beverage service with the Reldor 7-piece glass water jug drinkware set, featuring 1 x 1.58L glass jug and 6 x 280ml. Ideal for water, juice, cocktails, or iced tea—perfect for daily use or special occasions.

Elegant Crystal Cut Glass Design: Crafted from transparent heavy-duty glass with a distinctive crystal cut look, this jug and tumbler set adds a touch of style to any table. Light visually makes them look even appealing, making your drinks look even more refreshing.

Spacious Jug with Non-Drip Spout: Pour with ease using the 1.5L jug designed with a non-drip spout and wide handle. Whether you're serving lemonade, sangria or infused water, the jug ensures smooth flow serving without messy spills or drips.

Perfect for Infused Drinks & Ice: Generously sized jug and tumblers make room for lemon slices, berries, mint, or ice cubes. Ideal for refreshing drinks, this set is great for summer parties, family dinners, or everyday hydrationand special occasions at home or office.

Durable & Thick Glass Build & Ideal Gift : Made from premium-quality thick glass, the Reldor pitcher and tumbler set offers enhanced durability. Resistant to scratches—built to last through regular use.This elegant Reldor glass jug and tumbler set makes a thoughtful gift for birthdays, housewarmings, weddings or anniversaries.
description: Elevate your beverage service with the Reldor 7-Piece Glass Drinkware Set, a perfect blend of style, functionality, and durability. This complete set includes a 1 x 1.58L glass jug and 6 x 280ml glass tumblers, ideal for serving water, juice, iced tea, cocktails, or infused drinks. Designed with a distinctive crystal cut glass pattern, each piece reflects light beautifully, adding a touch of elegance to your table setting. Whether you're hosting a summer garden party, family dinner, or casual get-together, this set ensures a classy and refreshing drink experience. The jug features a non-drip spout and a wide, ergonomic handle, making pouring easy and mess-free—great for everything from lemonade and sangria to fruit-infused water. The tall and spacious tumblers give you enough room to add ice, lemon slices, mint, or berries to keep your beverages cool and vibrant. Crafted from heavy-duty, thick glass, the Reldor drinkware set is built to withstand daily use. Its sturdy construction offers high resistance to scratches, chips, and cracks, making it a long-lasting addition to any kitchen or dining collection. Both jug and tumblers are dishwasher safe, providing convenient cleaning after every use. Beyond its practicality, this glass set also makes a thoughtful and stylish gift for housewarmings, weddings, birthdays, or anniversaries—perfect for anyone who enjoys entertaining at home. Add timeless charm to your drink presentation and serve in style with Reldor’s premium glass jug and tumbler set—where functionality meets elegance. Special Features: Crystal Cut Design Large Capacity Jug Thick Durable Glass Easy Pour Design Ergonomic Handle
